_method: Kabsch Cα-RMSD; AF2-to-each-NMR-model vs NMR-model-to-model, over all shared Cα and Pocket-5 Cα; AF2 counts as an ensemble member if its mean RMSD <= the NMR internal max.

all_ca._verdict: AF2 mean exceeds the NMR internal spread (outlier)

pocket_ca._verdict: AF2 mean exceeds the NMR internal spread (outlier)
